May 11, 2026 Award Craftly Göttingen

Craftly.build Named Participant in the 2026 Innovationspreis Göttingen Northeim

Craftly is officially in the mix for the 2026 Innovationspreis der Region Göttingen Northeim — the award's largest year yet, with 161 projects competing. Forum für Ideen: September 14. Award ceremony: October 8.

May 5, 2026 PHP Laravel AI Craftly

Why We Chose Prism PHP for Our 9-Agent Orchestration

Building an AI-native forge isn't just about sending prompts. Here's why Craftly uses Prism — the Laravel AI SDK — for predictable, provider-agnostic multi-agent orchestration in PHP.

Read article →
April 19, 2026 Agency Laravel AI

Stop Billing for Boilerplate: Recovering 40 Unbillable Hours with AI

Every web project carries a hidden Boilerplate Tax — roughly $2,000 and 20–40 senior dev hours lost on auth, CRUD, and migrations before any business logic gets written. Here is how a 9-agent AI pipeline reclaims that time.

Read article →
April 19, 2026 AI Laravel Demo

From Prompt to Production: How Craftly Generates a Full Laravel App in Under 2 Minutes

A walkthrough of Craftly's Laravel pipeline — from a plain-language prompt to a running Sail app with 56 files and 15 CRUD views, for roughly 19 cents per generation.
